scripts.build: pnpm --filter @turnkeyai/involute-shared build && pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec vite build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @turnkeyai/involute-shared build && pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: sh -c 'pnpm --filter @turnkeyai/involute-shared build && export NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192; for file in $(find src -type f \( -name "*.test.ts" -o -name "*.test.tsx" \) | sort); do pnpm exec vitest --config vitest.config.ts --reporter=verbose --passWithNoTests --run "$file" || exit $?; done'
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @turnkeyai/involute-shared build && pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
